title: The better AI gets, the smaller its share of the economy might get – Alex Imas and Phil Trammell
summary: Dwarkesh Patel interviews Alex Imas and Phil Trammell on the economics of AGI. The discussion covers optimal taxation and wealth redistribution mechanisms, how non-AI-leading countries can benefit from AI gains, and whether inequality must increase as AI productivity rises. The counterintuitive claim explored is that better AI performance may paradoxically reduce AI's economic share.
